All other papers concern TCR engineering, specificity, downregulation, or a different regulator (PTPN22), none involving SRP9.",

Summary: Despite the query, none of the 10 papers connect SRP9 to TCR inhibition or any inhibitory T cell phenotype. The single SRP9 paper is a non-immune review, and the genuinely TCR-inhibitory study (PTPN22, PMC11237943) concerns a different regulator. Overall tier is **none** with high confidence.

parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study links SRP9 to TCR inhibition or a related inhibitory T cell phenotype. The only SRP9 paper (PMC11581171) is a review on SRP9/SRP14 regulation of Alu RNA with no T cell context. All other papers concern TCR engineering, specificity, downregulation, or a different regulator (PTPN22), none involving SRP9.
